name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #15
description: Florentine Brainrot #15 is a blue screen reliquary single-panel relic built around DaVinci and Synthwave Fresco Laundromat. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Sei di Spade, used here as the witness card. DaVinci's codon strip repeats like a clerk trying not to laugh. The caption has to tell the truth because the plaque cannot fit all the gossip. Serial DAVI-15 carries codon marker GATGCTGTAATAAACTGTATT; Gematria marks BASED at Σ 186.

attributes.value: a fake papal bull written as a Discord moderation warning
